mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dept (parent_dept_id, dept_name, dept_level, status) VALUES (#{parentDeptId}, #{deptName}, #{deptLevel}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT dept_id, parent_dept_id, dept_name, dept_level, status FROM dept
SELECT * FROM dept WHERE parent_dept_id = #{parentDeptId} AND dept_name = #{deptName}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dept WHERE parent_dept_id = #{deptId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId}
SELECT * FROM dept WHERE status = 1 AND dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%')
SELECT dept_id, parent_dept_id, dept_name, dept_level, status FROM dept WHERE status = 1
